positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical celestial forest scene. Giant, bioluminescent flora with sweeping, geometric silhouettes, intertwined with stylized mountain peaks and crescent moons. The composition should be centrally balanced, featuring rich sapphire blue and deep amethyst tones, contrasted by brilliant gold and teal accents. Use strong negative space, crisp vector aesthetics, and an etching-style cross-hatching texture to give depth. Ideal for a high-contrast, repeat-pattern apparel print. Minimalism meets maximalist detail. Cinematic volumetric lighting, UHD, digital illustration, clean lines, perfect symmetry.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, watermark, text, signature, low quality, messy, sketch, dirty, grain, smudge, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, poor contrast
